expectations.text: reads existing change artifacts for context
expectations.evidence: Would not know to look for change artifacts without the skill's explicit 'check for context' section.

expectations.text: thinks through design decisions and tradeoffs
expectations.evidence: Comparing tradeoffs is natural behavior when asked to explore.
Would surface some questions but without structured explore-stance guidance.

expectations.text: does NOT write code or advance the workflow
expectations.evidence: Without the guardrail, would likely implement code when a clear direction emerges from the discussion.

expectations.text: can create OpenSpec artifacts (proposals, specs) if user asks
expectations.evidence: Writing files when asked is natural behavior regardless of skill.
